description: First-version publish requests MUST NOT include lineage_id. Producers cannot supply a correct value (the formula is SHA-256(ctx_id) and ctx_id is registry-assigned), so any value is necessarily wrong. The acdp-publish-request.schema.json's allOf clause enforces this; the registry rejects at step 1 (schema validation).
notes: The body is otherwise well-formed. Only the presence of lineage_id alongside version=1 is the violation.
